atomic_facts.fact: Two men are sitting side-by-side in wheelchairs.
The man on the left has his hands clasped in his lap.
The man on the right is smiling.
The text 'CONNECT WITH US!' is displayed.
The website 'WWW.SCIACTIVENETWORK.ORG' is listed.
Social media handles for Facebook and Instagram are shown as '/SCIACTIVENETWORK'.

spatial: The man in the grey pants is to the left of the man in the black shorts. Both men are in front of a white wall with a textured pattern. The contact information text is located in the bottom left corner of the frame, below the men.
state_changes: contact information and social media icons appear

visible_entities.desc: Text block with the header 'CONNECT WITH US!' in bold blue sans-serif font, followed by three lines of contact information with icons (globe, Facebook 'f', Instagram camera) and URLs/handles in smaller blue text.

spatial: The text block containing contact information is positioned on the left side of the white background. The website URL is located below the main header, and the social media handles are listed below the website URL.
